title: Human Presence Is Not Judgment
prompt: Ask whether the human reviewer has time, evidence, authority, training, and protection to disagree with the system.

title: Override Authority Must Be Real
prompt: Review whether overrides are technically available, easy enough to use, protected, documented, and acted upon.

title: Judgment Needs Governance
prompt: Connect human review to uncertainty, escalation, contestability, remediation, and institutional ownership.
